Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Today, they're showing the "Eternal Love" series... It appears to be a set of classic romances.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Now that I think about it, I may never have seen such a straightforward love story before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}Well, this should be something of an experience. Let's make the most of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}There's something I need to tell you... I'm sorry I couldn't say this sooner, but I'm actually a prince from another country.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Forgive me for not being more honest with you. But believe me when I say that my love could not be more real![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But... I love you, too! Wherever you go, I'll be right by your side![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems love takes many forms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've learned the difference[n]between love and infatuation...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}...Is that really the standard for "eternal love"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}In the final scene, how did the man so conveniently determine where the woman was?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And why would he wait until the last moment to announce that he's secretly a prince?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 5 25 25}Why couldn't he tell her sooner? That's simply lackluster storytelling![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}And not only that, but the film ended just as the two began to settle down. Nothing to show of what comes after.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}If the writers knew how royalty actually lived, they wouldn't have called that a happy ending.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}In fact, that's when the most difficult part begins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Er— My apologies. I didn't intend to be overly critical...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}I just... couldn't help but compare it to my own life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}In a way, I suppose that means I must have enjoyed it quite a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
